channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: States Weekly: April 15, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers April 15, 2026.

item.title: Everything Is Connected Part II
item.description: In this week's column, Bill Reinsch describes how the war in Iran has illustrated the unintended consequences of policy decisions, arguing for government action that anticipates and plans for contingencies.

item.title: The Role of Land Power in the Future Global Security Environment
item.description: As conflicts evolve, CSIS is launching a study to examine the future role of U.S. land forces and their mission, structure, and resourcing within the joint force. This study will consider what a strong, adaptable land power presence means for our national security.

item.title: Expanding India’s Role in the International Semiconductor Ecosystem
item.description: India is emerging as a critical player in the global semiconductor ecosystem, leveraging its design strengths and talent base while scaling manufacturing and R&D—offering new opportunities for supply chain diversification and strategic collaboration.
